Ultimate Asi Loader.Description: This loader is good for plugin and play and compatibilty with Reshade or DXVK its similar to the .asi loader found in the original Smooth Patch By Lazy Duchess.

Sims 3 Settings Setter.Description: Mod that brings great performance patches to The Sims 3 it also includes its own smooth patch and borderless window modes!

MonoPatcher.Description: Library that allows Script Modders to replace Sims 3 methods with as much compatibility as possible - No need to create core mods anymore to replace game functions.

Intel Fix.Description: Very simple patch that attempts to workaround the crash on boot when trying to launch The Sims 3 on Intel alder lake CPU's (12th gen) or higher.

Making The Game Use More CPU.Description: Increases use of CPU. If you are using a PC with a low end CPU or a PC that is not meant for gaming this step should be skipped!

Change allocated GPU VRAM.Description: Increases use of GPU VRAM. Leave it untouched if not sure.

Flush DCBackup.Description: Clean DCBackup folder to prevent slowdowns. Do not use if intending to upload sims or lots with CC to exchange.

Stopping Store Generated Jpgs.Description: Stop game from generating images for store items.
